falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,800 on any single day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break below the August 2024 lows invalidates the bottom pattern match; the 78% similarity to bottom_2024_aug requires holding above that structural support level

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for two consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained volatility spike above 35 contradicts the BLOWOFF SCORE of 38, which signals complacency/late-cycle positioning rather than panic; this would indicate capitulation, not bottoming behavior

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops more than 40 basis points from current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A flight-to-safety rally of that magnitude in rates would signal recession/de-risking, invalidating the macro bottom call which requires stable or rising yields to confirm risk-asset stabilization

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
